topic: L1 Trend Layer + L2 Viral Brain — snscrape, pytrends, TikTok Trends, YouTube trending, BERTopic, LLM-as-judge scoring, hook generation, GBDT training

focus: Survey trend data sources — snscrape status, pytrends capabilities, TikTok trend APIs, YouTube Data API v3 trending
noveltyJustification: All 4 findings are new (snscrape dead, pytrends-modern exists, TikTok Creative Center path, YouTube quota details). Minor overlap with gen1 high-level mentions reduces from 1.0 to 0.88.
ruledOut: TikTok Research API for commercial use (academic only)

focus: pytrends advanced config (rate limits, methods, geo, polling), TikTok Creative Center deep dive (data fields, filters, Apify actor), BERTopic Thai+English multilingual config + online learning
noveltyJustification: 5 of 6 findings fully new (pytrends methods/rate details, pytrends polling strategy, TikTok CC data fields, BERTopic multilingual config, BERTopic online learning). 1 partially new (Apify actor -- extends iter-1 mention with pricing/category details). Ratio: (5 + 0.5*1)/6 = 0.917 rounded to 0.83 accounting for pytrends archive status already hinted in iter-1.
ruledOut: WangchanBERTa as primary BERTopic embedding for mixed Thai+English
original pytrends repo for production (archived April 2025)

focus: Trend freshness/velocity scoring model (Q6), LLM-as-judge 6-dimension rubric design (Q7), Hook variant generation system (Q8)
noveltyJustification: 4 of 5 findings fully new (velocity model, LLM rubric, hook generation, LLM pitfalls). 1 partially new (composite viral score integrates Q6+Q7 into unified formula but builds on gen1 concept). Ratio: (4 + 0.5*1)/5 = 0.90, reduced to 0.80 accounting for gen1 high-level mentions of 6-dimension scoring and hook generation.
ruledOut: 0-10 float scoring scale for LLM-as-judge (1-5 categorical integer strongly preferred)
single mega-prompt for all 6 dimensions (separate prompts per dimension required)

focus: GBDT model training pipeline (Q9), Scoring calibration & feedback loop (Q10), Thai-specific NLP/patterns (Q11)
noveltyJustification: 4 of 5 findings fully new (feature vector design, LightGBM vs XGBoost decision, training pipeline with cold start, Thai NLP pipeline). 1 partially new (drift detection/calibration extends iter-3 calibration protocol with production monitoring). Ratio: (4 + 0.5*1)/5 = 0.90, reduced to 0.80 accounting for some GBDT/scoring concepts mentioned at high level in gen1.
ruledOut: raw view count as GBDT target (biased by followers)
random train/test split for temporal data (data leakage)
standard dictionary segmentation for Thai social media (OOV failures)

focus: n8n orchestration L1->L2->L3 workflow chain design (Q12) + TikTok Creative Center JSON response schema completion (Q3)
noveltyJustification: All 5 findings are new: TikTok CC complete JSON schemas (never documented before), n8n sub-workflow architecture pattern, complete L1->L2->L3 workflow chain with cron schedules, error handling/partial data strategy, BERTopic microservice architecture decision. 4.5/5 ratio rounded to 0.90 (minor overlap with iter-2 TikTok CC partial data).
ruledOut: single monolithic n8n workflow for L1+L2 (too complex)
real-time webhooks from data sources (not supported, polling only)
